reviews.review_description: This game is 100% a 10/10 because you can do many stuff, from playing with friends all the way to going to many cool maps. This is an amazing game. The music is awesome, There is some awesome cosmetics like the sweat band and the heart badge! This is a 100% recommendation to people who want games like this.

This game is literally one of the best I’ve played, the experience of meeting new people and having a good time just makes this game perfect! I was one of the top #10 people that where there to experience the first full lobby and has been an honor to be the top #10 people to ever play the game. I am now a trial mod and I can’t wait to see where this game goes in the future.
This game is so fun and it’s really funny to play with with friends but 1 think that I wish was you can see your cosmetics but for the most part a really fun game.
I've already played the game and can say it's really great and you should 100% try it out yourself

So I played with the owner and some other people and there is horror shop caves and movement is awesome and the game is fun I suggest you get it
It’s really good.When you go in the game the loading screen is cool and horror is scawy I had a lot of fun
